testcase.name: contextLoads
testcase.system-out:
13:37:54.403 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [edu.lopezalejandro._aMarcha.ApplicationTests]: ApplicationTests does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 13:37:54.570 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration edu.lopezalejandro._aMarcha.Application for test class edu.lopezalejandro._aMarcha.ApplicationTests 13:37:54.766 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.devtools.restart.RestartApplicationListener -- Restart disabled due to context in which it is running
